untranslatable_reason: This is a constrained portfolio optimization rule (Lagrange multiplier method for variance minimization), not a position sizing rule. It describes how to allocate capital across N securities to achieve a target portfolio return while minimizing variance. This is asset allocation/portfolio construction methodology, not a trade-by-trade position sizing method. The sizing methods (OPTIMAL_F, KELLY, FIXED_FRACTIONAL, etc.) apply to individual trade risk, not to solving constrained multi-asset allocation problems.
